dataSources.title: Data Sources
dataSources.centerSubtitle: Manage global data connections and status
dataSources.sourceIdHint: Only letters, numbers and underscores allowed, e.g. my_data
dataSources.modeAutoHint: Fetches data on page load and at polling intervals. For telemetry / read endpoints.
dataSources.modeManualHint: Only called when triggered by widget interaction (button click, switch toggle). For control / command endpoints.
dataSources.selectToBegin: Select a data source to begin
dataSources.orClickAdd: Or click "Add" to create a new one
dataSources.confirmDeleteDesc: Are you sure you want to delete data source "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
dataSources.invalidSourceId: Invalid Source ID format. Only letters, numbers and underscores allowed.

imageUpload.title: Image Upload Settings
imageUpload.storageConfigDesc: Choose image storage method. Default is local storage (IndexedDB + Object URL), or configure OSS cloud storage.
imageUpload.localModeDesc: Images are saved in browser IndexedDB, accessed via Object URL. Suitable for offline use, no canvas data overhead.
imageUpload.securityWarningDesc: Access Key is stored in browser local storage. For production, use a backend proxy for uploads to avoid exposing keys.
